overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy mountainous landscape. The character traverses a forested trail, ascends stone steps carved into the mountainside, and follows a cliffside path overlooking a misty alpine lake. The environment features winter vegetation, snow-dusted terrain, and atmospheric overcast lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward a stone staircase visible ahead

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the trail with snow on branches
dense evergreen trees lining the right side creating a corridor effect
tall mountain peak with visible snow fields, partially obscured by atmospheric haze
narrow winding dirt path through the forest with patches of snow
low stone retaining wall visible at the trail edge marking the staircase entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow dirt trail winding through a dense coniferous forest. Snow-dusted evergreen trees flank both sides of the path, while a massive snow-capped mountain looms ahead in the misty distance. The character walks forward along the forest trail, approaching a stone structure visible at the path's end.

events.description: character transitions from flat dirt path to ascending stone steps

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep stone staircase carved into the mountainside, with a stone wall on the left and snowy rocky terrain on the right

entered.detail: worn stone steps ascending steeply up the mountain face
rocky hillside covered with patches of snow and sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a steep stone staircase flanked by a stone retaining wall on the left and a snow-covered rocky slope on the right. The dense forest falls away as the elevation increases, though trees remain visible in the distance. The path consists of weathered stone steps leading upward through the mountain terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside overlook with panoramic lake view

events.description: path opens dramatically to reveal expansive mountain lake view as character reaches cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow cliff edge path with the mountain lake coming into view on the left side

entered.detail: large alpine lake visible in the valley below, surrounded by forested shores and mist
sheer rocky cliff wall rising steeply on the right side of the path
leafless dead tree standing near the cliff edge overlooking the water

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the landscape opens dramatically to reveal a vast mountain lake below. The path continues along the cliff edge, with a sheer rock face on the right and the misty water expanse on the left. Sparse dead trees and patches of snow dot the terrain as the character proceeds along the elevated cliff path.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside trail through mixed forest and grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the lakeshore path with water visible to the left and forested slopes rising to the right

entered.detail: dense coniferous trees covering the slope above the lake shore

segments.scene_description: The path descends slightly and transitions to a lakeside trail running closer to the water's edge. The steep cliff gives way to grassy slopes and denser coniferous forest on the right, while the calm lake waters remain visible on the left. The character continues walking along this shoreline route, with the lake now appearing closer and more detailed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded forest trail that ascends into a dramatic cliffside vista before descending toward a serene lakeside path. It begins on a narrow dirt trail winding through a dense coniferous forest, moving toward a massive snow-capped mountain looming in the misty distance. As the character reaches the end of the path, the scene shifts to a steep ascent up weathered stone stairs, causing the dense forest to fall away as the elevation increases. The landscape then opens dramatically at the top of the stairs to reveal a vast mountain lake, with the camera following a high cliff edge flanked by a sheer rock face and misty waters. Finally, the path descends from the heights, transitioning into a shoreline route where the steep cliffs give way to grassy slopes and the calm lake appears closer and more detailed.
